title: Sinch Contact Structure
description: Documentation of the contact data structure in the Sinch Conversation API

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique contact identifier assigned by Sinch

fields.name: channel_identities
fields.description: List of channel-specific identities for this contact

fields.name: channel_identities[].identity
fields.description: Channel-specific identity (e.g., phone number for SMS)

fields.name: display_name
fields.description: Human-readable display name for the contact

fields.name: external_id
fields.description: External system identifier for the contact

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Custom metadata string for the contact
